config.learning.maxStoredLineLength.titl: Max stored line length for learning
config.learning.minConfidence.descriptio: Minimum confidence (0–1) required before a pattern is offered as a suggestion.
config.learning.minConfidence.title: Minimum suggestion confidence
config.learning.suggestionFrequency.desc: How often to prompt when high-confidence filter suggestions are available.
config.learning.trackScrollBehavior.desc: Treat fast scrolling as a weak signal for noisy lines (more events stored). Off by default.
config.levelDetection.markdownDescriptio: 行をエラーとして分類する積極性。`strict` はキーワードがラベル位置（例：`Error:`、`[ERROR]`）にあることを必要とします。`loose` はテキストの任意の場所でキーワードを一致させます。
config.levelDetection.title: How aggressively to classify lines as errors.
config.lintReportImpactLevel.description: Which lint impact levels to include in the bug report 'Known Lint Issues' section. Essential = critical and high only; recommended = plus medium; full = all (including low and opinionated).
config.lintReportImpactLevel.enum.full: All impact levels including low and opinionated.
config.lintReportImpactLevel.title: Which lint impact levels to include in the bug report 'Known Lint Iss…
config.logDirectory.description: ログファイルのディレクトリ（ワークスペースルートからの相対パス）。
config.logDirectory.title: Directory for log files, relative to workspace root.
config.loki.enabled.title: Enable Export to Loki.
config.loki.pushUrl.title: Loki › Push Url
config.maxLines.description: ログファイルあたりの最大行数。超えた場合は最も古い行が削除されます。
config.maxLines.title: Maximum lines per log file.
config.maxLogFiles.description: 保持するログファイルの最大数（有効な場合はサブディレクトリを含む）。0 = 無制限。超えた場合は最も古いファイルが削除されます。
config.maxLogFiles.title: Maximum number of log files to retain (including subdirectories when …
config.minimapProportionalLines.markdown: Draw scrollbar minimap markers with a width that reflects line length versus the log pane (capped at full strip width), similar to the editor minimap. Uses character count against an estimated row width; updates when the pane is resized. When word wrap is on, lines longer than one row are shown at full width. Turn off to always use the full minimap width for each marker.
config.minimapProportionalLines.title: Scrollbar minimap: proportional line width
config.minimapShowInfoMarkers.markdownDe: スクロールバーミニマップに **info**、**debug**、**notice** レベルのマーカーを表示します。無効（デフォルト）の場合、エラー、警告、パフォーマンス、ToDo マーカーのみが表示され、重要なイベントに集中できます。
config.minimapShowInfoMarkers.title: Show info / debug / notice markers on the scrollbar minimap.
config.minimapShowSqlDensity.markdownDes: Shades the **log scroll map** (the strip beside the log) where SQL lines cluster: pink for SQL, orange/amber for slow SQL. Full-width background wash; severity and search stay as short ticks on top. Not a second scrollbar. Turn off for severity-only ticks.
config.minimapShowSqlDensity.title: Scroll map: SQL activity shading (pink / orange)
config.minimapViewportOutsideArrow.markd: Show a **small yellow arrow** in a narrow strip **to the left of** the scrollbar minimap. The arrow moves to point at the **vertical middle** of the visible log range so you can spot your scroll position at a glance. Does not change minimap width settings; it adds 12px beside the minimap when enabled.
config.minimapViewportOutsideArrow.title: Scrollbar minimap: yellow “you are here” arrow outside the strip
config.minimapViewportRedOutline.markdow: Draw a **high-contrast red inset border** around the minimap viewport slider (the rectangle that shows which part of the log is visible). Easier to see than the default translucent bar on dark themes.
config.minimapViewportRedOutline.title: Scrollbar minimap: red outline on viewport indicator
config.minimapWidth.description: スクロールバーミニマップの幅：small（40px）、medium（60px）、large（90px）。
config.minimapWidth.title: Scrollbar minimap width (28px–120px presets)
config.organizeFolders.description: 日付プレフィックスを持つログファイルを日付ベースのサブフォルダーに自動的に移動します（例：reports/20260218/）。
config.organizeFolders.title: Automatically move log files with a date prefix into date-based subfo…
config.playConsole.appUrl.description: Google Play Console でのアプリへの完全な URL（例：https://play.google.com/console/u/0/developers/12345/app/67890/vitals/overview）。空の場合は Play Console ホームページを開きます。
config.playConsole.appUrl.title: Play Console › App Url
config.playConsole.enabled.description: Google Play Vitals パネルを有効にします。Play Console へのアクセスと、GCP プロジェクトで Play Developer Reporting API が有効化されていることが必要です。
config.playConsole.enabled.title: Enable Google Play Vitals panel.
config.projectIndex.enabled.title: Enable project-wide indexing of documentation and knowledge files for…
config.projectIndex.includeReports.title: Index completed (non-active, non-trashed) log files from the reports …
config.projectIndex.includeRootFiles.tit: Index matching files at workspace root (README.md, CHANGELOG.md, etc.).
config.projectIndex.maxFilesPerSource.ti: Maximum number of files to index per source directory.
config.projectIndex.sources.title: Directories to index for project knowledge.
config.redactEnvVars.description: コンテキストヘッダーから編集する環境変数名のパターン。* ワイルドカードをサポート（例：API_KEY、SECRET_*）。
config.redactEnvVars.title: Environment variable name patterns to redact from context headers.
config.repeatCollapseDmlMinCount.markdow: Minimum repeats before collapse for Drift **INSERT**, **UPDATE**, and **DELETE** on database-tagged lines. Higher values keep mutations visible longer.
config.repeatCollapseDmlMinCount.title: Repeat collapse: DML SQL
config.repeatCollapseGlobalMinCount.mark: Minimum identical log lines (within the repeat time window) before the viewer collapses them into repeat rows. Applies to non-SQL lines and Drift SQL with an unrecognized verb. Minimum 2.
config.repeatCollapseGlobalMinCount.titl: Repeat collapse: global minimum line count
config.repeatCollapseReadMinCount.markdo: Same as global, but for Drift **SELECT**, **WITH**, and **PRAGMA** on database-tagged lines. Lower values collapse noisy read traffic sooner. Sparse streams may not reach this count within the repeat window.
config.repeatCollapseReadMinCount.title: Repeat collapse: read-shaped SQL (SELECT / WITH / PRAGMA)
config.repeatCollapseTransactionMinCount: Minimum repeats before collapse for Drift **BEGIN**, **COMMIT**, and **ROLLBACK** on database-tagged lines.
config.replay.defaultMode.title: Default replay mode: use actual line timing when available (timed) or…
config.replay.defaultSpeed.title: Replay › Default Speed
config.replay.maxDelayMs.title: Maximum delay between lines during replay (ms).
config.replay.minLineDelayMs.title: Minimum delay between lines during replay (ms).
config.reportFolder.description: Folder for auto-created bug report files (relative to workspace root, or absolute path).
config.reportFolder.title: Folder for auto-created bug report files (relative to workspace root,…
config.sessionListPageSize.title: Logs per page in Logs panel.
config.severityKeywords.error.descriptio: Keywords classified as error (red). Built-in structural patterns always apply regardless of this list.
config.severityKeywords.markdownDescript: Keywords that trigger each severity level. Each keyword is matched as a case-insensitive whole word. Structural patterns (logcat prefixes, Error:, [error], Dart _TypeError) are built-in and cannot be changed here.
config.severityKeywords.performance.desc: Keywords classified as performance (skipped-frames, jank, GC).
config.severityKeywords.title: Severity keywords
config.share.gistPublic.title: Create public gists (visible to anyone) vs.
config.share.includeNotes.title: Include collection notes in shared gist README.
config.share.sharedFolderPath.title: Optional path for team shared folder (absolute or relative to workspa…
config.share.uploadPutUrl.title: Share › Upload Put Url
config.showElapsedTime.description: ビューアーで連続するログ行間の経過時間（+Nms）を表示します。
config.showElapsedTime.title: Show elapsed time (+Nms) between consecutive log lines in the viewer.
config.signalSlowOpThresholdMs.descripti: Minimum duration (ms) for a slow-operation signal. Operations faster than this are ignored.
config.signalSlowOpThresholdMs.title: Signal: slow operation threshold (ms)
config.showScrollbar.description: ログビューアーでネイティブの縦スクロールバーを表示します。オフ（既定）の場合、ミニマップが唯一のスクロールインジケーターです。
config.showScrollbar.title: Show scrollbar in log viewer (default: off)
config.slowGapThreshold.description: 行間の遅いギャップをハイライトするための経過時間のしきい値（ミリ秒）。
config.slowGapThreshold.title: Elapsed time threshold (ms) for highlighting slow gaps between lines.
When opening a log, suggest adding a bookmark at the first error line if that line is not already bookmarked (one suggestion per session).
When opening a log, suggest adding a bookmark at the first error line…
config.smartBookmarks.suggestFirstWarnin: When suggesting the first error is disabled or absent, suggest a bookmark at the first warning line instead.
When suggesting the first error is disabled or absent, suggest a book…
config.splitRules.description: ログファイルを自動的に分割するルール。すべての値が 0 の場合、そのルールは無効です。
config.splitRules.keywords.description: 分割をトリガーするキーワード（例：'HOT RESTART'、'/SPLIT/'）。
config.splitRules.maxDurationMinutes.des: この分数が経過するとファイルを分割します。0 = 無効。
config.splitRules.maxLines.description: この行数に達するとファイルを分割します。0 = 無効。
config.splitRules.maxSizeKB.description: このサイズ（KB）に達するとファイルを分割します。0 = 無効。
config.splitRules.silenceMinutes.descrip: この分数の沈黙が続くとファイルを分割します。0 = 無効。
config.splitRules.title: Rules for automatically splitting log files.
When enabled, the log viewer can offer “Static sources” from SQL fingerprints (project index search; suggestive only). When disabled, that affordance is hidden and the host skips static search.
Suggest static Dart/Drift sources from SQL fingerprints
config.stderrTreatAsError.markdownDescri: When enabled, every line with DAP output category **stderr** is treated as an error (red styling). When disabled (default), stderr lines use the same text-based rules as stdout (logcat prefix, Drift SQL traces, keywords). Many Flutter/Dart tools send informational output on stderr; leave this off unless you rely on stream-as-error semantics.
config.stderrTreatAsError.title: Treat stderr DAP category as error
config.suppressTransientErrors.descripti: 想定される一時的なエラー（TimeoutException、SocketException、ECONNREFUSED など）を非表示にします。必要に応じてフィルタリングされた行を展開できます。
config.suppressTransientErrors.title: Hide expected transient errors (TimeoutException, SocketException, EC…
config.tailPatterns.description: テールモード用のグロブパターン。一致するファイルは「テールファイルを開く」で開けます。ファイルが増えると新しい行が追加表示されます（例: **/*.log）。
config.tailPatterns.title: Glob patterns for tail mode.
config.title: Saropa Log Capture
config.treeRefreshInterval.description: アクティブな録音中のツリービュー更新間隔（秒）。0 = 適応型（小さいファイルは 3 秒、中くらいのファイルは 10 秒、大きいファイルは 30 秒）。
config.treeRefreshInterval.title: Tree view refresh interval in seconds during active recording.
config.verboseDap.description: すべての生の DAP プロトコルメッセージ（リクエスト、レスポンス、イベント）をログファイルに記録します。大量の出力が生成されます — アダプターの通信問題をデバッグする際に使用します。
config.verboseDap.title: Log all raw DAP protocol messages (requests, responses, events) to th…
config.viewerAlwaysShowSearchMatchOption: Always show match case, whole word, and regular expression toggles in the log viewer search bar. When off (default), those toggles appear only while the search field is focused or has text.
Always show log search match options
config.viewerDbDetectorBaselineHintsEnab: When a SQL baseline is set (e.g. from log comparison), emit a one-time marker when this session exceeds the baseline execution count for a fingerprint.
config.viewerDbDetectorTimestampBurstEna: When database signals are on, emit a marker when multiple DB queries fire at the same timestamp (within 10ms tolerance), indicating redundant or concurrent lookups.
Log viewer: DB timestamp burst markers
config.viewerDbDetectorNPlusOneEnabled.d: When database signals are on, run the N+1-style Drift SQL burst detector (synthetic signal rows).
When database signals are on, emit slow-query burst marker rows using the slow-burst thresholds.
Log viewer: slow query burst markers
config.signalAutoTrack.description: Automatically persist detected signals (errors, warnings, performance, SQL patterns) to session metadata for cross-session tracking. Disable to only track signals you manually pin to cases.
config.signalAutoTrack.title: Auto-track signals across sessions
config.viewerDbSignalsEnabled.descriptio: When enabled, the log viewer runs DB signal detectors (e.g. N+1 query hints) and enriches database-tagged lines with SQL fingerprint rollup stats.
config.viewerDbSignalsEnabled.title: Enable database signals in the log viewer
config.viewerDetectAsciiArt.description: Experimental: detect pixel-based ASCII art (logos, figlet banners) using entropy heuristics and group them as art blocks. May increase CPU usage on large logs. Default off. Reload the log viewer after changing.
config.viewerDetectAsciiArt.title: Detect pixel-based ASCII art in logs
config.viewerGroupAsciiArt.description: When enabled, consecutive separator/box-art lines with the same timestamp are rendered as a single visual block: the first line keeps its decoration, subsequent lines show only the art content with a shimmer effect and continuous gutter bar. Reload the log viewer after changing.
config.viewerGroupAsciiArt.title: Group consecutive ASCII art lines into visual blocks
config.viewerKeybindings.description: Override viewer panel power shortcuts (e.g. openSearch, togglePause). Keys are action IDs; values are key descriptors (e.g. "ctrl+f", "space"). Change from Options → Keyboard shortcuts by double-clicking a power shortcut row.
config.viewerKeybindings.title: Viewer Keybindings
config.viewerMaxLines.description: ビューアに表示する最大行数（0 = 既定の50,000）。maxLinesを超えてはいけません。
config.viewerMaxLines.title: Maximum lines shown in the viewer (0 = default 50,000).
config.viewerPreserveAsciiBoxArt.descrip: When enabled, log lines that look like Unicode box banners (text between paired vertical bars "│ … │" on the same line) are shown as normal lines, not stack frames, so stack preview does not collapse them with "[+N more]". Reload the log viewer after changing.
config.viewerPreserveAsciiBoxArt.title: Preserve ASCII/Unicode box-art lines in the log viewer
config.viewerSlowBurstCooldownMs.descrip: Minimum log time (milliseconds) between burst markers per session. Use 0 to disable cooldown.
config.viewerSlowBurstCooldownMs.title: Slow burst: cooldown (ms)
config.viewerSlowBurstMinCount.descripti: How many slow queries within the window are required before inserting a burst marker.
config.viewerSlowBurstMinCount.title: Slow burst: minimum slow query count
config.viewerSlowBurstSlowQueryMs.descri: Minimum query duration (milliseconds, from per-line replay metadata) to count toward a slow-query burst marker.
config.viewerSlowBurstSlowQueryMs.title: Slow burst: minimum slow query duration (ms)
config.viewerSlowBurstWindowMs.descripti: Rolling time window (milliseconds) for counting slow queries toward a burst.
config.viewerSlowBurstWindowMs.title: Slow burst: window (ms)
config.watchPatterns.alert.description: アラートタイプ：flash（視覚的なパルス）、badge（サイドバーのカウント）、none（カウンターのみ）。
config.watchPatterns.description: ログ出力で監視するキーワード。各エントリにはキーワード（文字列または /regex/）とアラートタイプがあります。
config.watchPatterns.keyword.description: ログ出力で監視するテキストまたは /regex/ パターン。
config.watchPatterns.title: Keywords to watch for in log output.
description: VS Code デバッグコンソールの出力を自動的に永続ログファイルに保存します
view.logViewer.name: ログビューアー
view.vitalsPanel.name: Play Vitals
viewContainer.saropaLogCapture.title: Saropa Log Capture
walkthrough.aboutSaropa.description:
Saropa Pty Limited — 2010年からデジタルセーフガードを構築。

Dart パッケージ、VS Code 拡張機能、信頼性を重視する開発者向けのコンシューマーアプリを提供しています。

[saropa.com を訪問](https://saropa.com/)
walkthrough.aboutSaropa.title: Saropa について
walkthrough.browseHistory.description:
すべてのログは **プロジェクトログ** パネルに保存されます。サイドバーのログアイコンをクリックし、右クリックして名前の変更、タグ付け、エクスポート、ディープリンクの共有ができます。

[ログビューアーを開く](command:saropaLogCapture.logViewer.focus)
walkthrough.browseHistory.title: ログ履歴を参照
walkthrough.configureSettings.descriptio:
**設定** で監視パターン、ハイライトルール、除外、分割ルールを設定します。

[設定を開く](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22saropaLogCapture%22)
walkthrough.configureSettings.title: セットアップをカスタマイズ
walkthrough.getStarted.description: Saropa Log Capture を使用してデバッグ出力をキャプチャおよび分析する方法を学びます。
walkthrough.getStarted.title: ログキャプチャを始める
walkthrough.openViewer.description:
アクティビティバーの **Saropa Log Capture** アイコンをクリックして、カラー、折りたたみ可能なスタック、検索機能付きのライブログ出力を表示します。

[ログビューアーを開く](command:saropaLogCapture.logViewer.focus)
walkthrough.openViewer.title: ログビューアーを開く
walkthrough.startDebugging.description:
デバッグを開始すると、ログのキャプチャが自動的に始まります。**F5** を押すか、**実行とデバッグ** パネルを使用して開始してください。

[デバッグを開始](command:workbench.action.debug.start)
walkthrough.startDebugging.title: デバッグセッションを開始
walkthrough.useKeyboardShortcuts.descrip: **スペース** で一時停止、**Ctrl+F** で検索、**P** で行をピン留め、**N** で注釈付け、**M** でマーカー挿入。
walkthrough.useKeyboardShortcuts.title: キーボードショートカットをマスター
